1 Topic

Shopify Sales Dataset

2 Research Question

To what extent do marketing acquisition channels and applied discount levels influence the probability of a high-value customer conversion, and can these variables be utilized to build a predictive model for future customer acquisition? BV

3 Project Objectives

  1. Do repeat customers behave differently, such as fewer returns or bigger average order number? LLW
